Exhibitor Directory

Vendor-001 Inc.

Booth Z-001 — Vendor-001 provides a broad portfolio across embedded AI, computer vision, robotic perception, edge inference, and on-device language understanding. Their flagship product line covers SoC compilers, runtime libraries, and reference firmware for customers in automotive ADAS, smart cities, industrial automation, and consumer electronics. They also offer professional services for model porting, INT8 quantization, and platform certification work in safety-critical contexts. Established presence across NA, EMEA, and APAC with field application engineering teams in 12 metros.

Their flagship product line covers SoC compilers, runtime libraries, and reference firmware for customers in automotive ADAS, smart cities, industrial automation, and consumer electronics. They also offer professional services for model porting, INT8 quantization, and platform certification work in safety-critical contexts. Established presence across NA, EMEA, and APAC with field application engineering teams in 12 metros.

They also offer professional services for model porting, INT8 quantization, and platform certification work in safety-critical contexts. Their flagship product line covers SoC compilers, runtime libraries, and reference firmware for customers in automotive ADAS, smart cities, industrial automation, and consumer electronics. They also offer professional services for model porting, INT8 quantization, and platform certification work in safety-critical contexts. Established presence across NA, EMEA, and APAC with field application engineering teams in 12 metros.
